Download Atelier

Free. No account. No subscription. Open the .dmg, drag to Applications, done.

Download for Mac (macOS 13+)

System requirements

macOS 13 Ventura or later. Apple Silicon and Intel both supported.

Getting started

1. Download

Click the button above to download the latest .dmg from GitHub Releases.

2. Install

Open the .dmg file and drag Atelier into your Applications folder. Eject the disk image.

3. Open

Launch Atelier from Applications. It starts with one project already seeded so you can see it in action immediately.

Where is my data?

Everything lives in: ~/Library/Application Support/com.jude.atelier/atelier-state.json It's plain JSON. You can open it in any text editor, back it up to wherever you want, or copy it between machines.

Updates

Atelier checks for updates silently on launch. If a new version is available you'll see a prompt in Settings (⌘,). You can also check manually anytime from the Updates section.

Open source

Atelier is open source. Read the code, file issues, or build it yourself from the repository.
